name: lastfm
title: Last.fm
description: Display your favourite, recently played tracks, your top albums and artists and more from Last.fm on Raycast!
author: eggsy

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Menu Bar Player
commands.subtitle: Last.fm
commands.description: Shows the currently playing track in the macOS menubar.

preferences.title: Menubar Icon
preferences.name: menubarIcon
preferences.description: Choose the icon displayed next to the track name in the menubar.

preferences.title: Now Playing Text Length
preferences.name: nowPlayingLength
preferences.description: Maximum number of characters to display in the menubar title. Set to 0 for no limit.

preferences.title: Display
preferences.label: Hide artist's name
preferences.name: hideArtistName
preferences.description: Show only the track name in the menubar, without the artist.

preferences.label: Cleanup song title
preferences.name: cleanupSongTitle
preferences.description: Strip common suffixes from track names such as (feat. ...), (Remastered), (Radio Edit), etc.

commands.name: now-playing
commands.title: Now Playing
commands.subtitle: Last.fm
commands.description: Shows the currently playing track in a detail view.

commands.name: combined
commands.title: Top & Recent Songs
commands.subtitle: Last.fm
commands.description: Display your top and recent songs!

preferences.name: apikey
preferences.description: You can get one from https://www.last.fm/api/accounts
preferences.title: API Key

preferences.name: apiSecret
preferences.description: Found alongside your API key at https://www.last.fm/api/accounts. Required for love/unlove.
preferences.title: API Secret

preferences.name: username
preferences.description: Your Last.fm username, can be found on your profile page
preferences.title: Username

preferences.name: limit
preferences.description: The number of results to show in results page.
preferences.placeholder: The number of results to show
preferences.title: Limit
Period
preferences.name: period
preferences.description: Select the period of songs that you want to display.
